ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the R package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package's functionality */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "repository" TEXT /* The repository where the package is hosted */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the package is distributed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the package was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the package was last updated */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* The homepage or documentation URL for the package */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* The number of times the package has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being depended upon */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Depends, Imports) */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the dependent package */,
  "required_version" TEXT /* The version range required for the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_methods" (
  "import_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import method entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package associated with the import method */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of import (e.g., library(), require()) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences of this import method in the package */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the import method is used */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* The line number in the file where the import method is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that requires another package */,
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required package */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the required package */,
  "required_version" TEXT /* The version range required for the required package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user utilizing the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project where the package is used */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* The frequency of usage (e.g., number of times used in a day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "registered_at" TEXT /* The date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing usage and dependencies */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., usage, dependency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_reports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package associated with the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class used in the package */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the class is used */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* The line number in the file where the class is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being analyzed */,
  "heaviness_value" INTEGER /* Heaviness value indicating the impact of the package on others */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the statistics were last updated */,
  "dependency_count" INTEGER /* The number of dependencies the package has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_statistics_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the project was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who owns the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_packages" (
  "project_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-package relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the package used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the role assigned to the user for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
